name: Pico De Gallo - Rooster's Beak Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine diced ripe tomatoes, chopped white onion, fresh cilantro leaves, finely chopped serrano or jalapeno (with seeds and all), and ice water in a large bowl.
2. Add salt and lime juice to taste.
3. Mix gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Serve immediately for the best flavor and texture. This salsa should remain crisp and not become mushy. It pairs well with many dishes.
